instruction: In Finder, add the {TAG} tag to the file ~/Documents/{FILE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5); Tier-A exec reads the file's Finder tag via the com.apple.metadata:_kMDItemUserTags extended attribute

args: osascript -e 'on run argv' -e 'tell application "Finder" to set the tag names of (POSIX file (item 1 of argv) as alias) to {item 2 of argv}' -e 'end run' "$HOME/Documents/{FILE}" "{TAG}" 2>/dev/null || true
xattr -p com.apple.metadata:_kMDItemUserTags "$HOME/Documents/{FILE}" 2>/dev/null | xxd -r -p 2>/dev/null | plutil -convert json -o - - 2>/dev/null || echo none
